Also, I notice the Alpha158 handler already applies CSZScoreNorm internally, so double-normalization might hurt. Let me submit the MLP checkpoint and also prepare a better model. The key issue is the large gap between validation IC (~0.03) and test IC (~0.005). I should try: 1) Submit MLP to get baseline, 2) Try a more robust approach using Qlib's built-in normalization without double-normalization, 3) Try ensemble of models. Let me first submit MLP, then try a better LightGBM with proper settings.
